mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_tokens (user_id, token_hash, token_type, expires_at, created_at, revoked, replaced_by) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tokenHash}, #{tokenType}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdAt}, #{revoked}, #{replacedBy})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_tokens WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM user_tokens WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM user_tokens WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked = 0 AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM user_tokens WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user_tokens SET revoked = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_tokens WHERE expires_at < NOW() AND revoked = 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_tokens WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND revoked = 0 AND expires_at > NOW()
